---
title: "🗓️ Week 14 - Open geospatial data"
---

In this week, we will learn what are spatial web services and know several Colombia's examples. 


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 


- [Spatial web services](https://gis4schools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/part2/2_1.html)

- [Datos abiertos de Colombia](https://datos.gov.co/)


## **Practical exercises**:


- [Sistema para la planificacion rural agropecuaria](https://sipra.upra.gov.co/nacional)

- [Sistema para la gestion de riesgos agropecuarios](https://sigra.upra.gov.co/)

- [Ortoimagen Bogota](https://datosabiertos.bogota.gov.co/dataset/7dfc3d91-96db-46ef-b331-5586d78d6a2a?_external=True)


## 📚 Informe No. 2 (25%) 

#### Publish your third notebook similar to [this one](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/soc_interp)

Due on 23.07.2026 at 11:59 pm.
